name: Next.js App Router
systemContext: This is a Next.js 14+ project using the App Router. TypeScript is required everywhere. Styling uses Tailwind CSS. State management uses Zustand for client state. Data fetching happens in Server Components unless interactivity is required.

rules: Use App Router (app/) exclusively — never Pages Router (pages/)
Server Components are the default — only add 'use client' when you need interactivity or browser APIs
Data fetching belongs in Server Components using async/await
Route groups use (parentheses) for layout organization without affecting URL
Dynamic segments use [brackets], catch-all use [...slug]
UI primitives go in /components/ui/ (buttons, inputs, modals)
Business components go in /components/features/{domain}/
Each component file exports one primary component as default
Component props use interface, not type alias
Every new component must have a corresponding .test.tsx file
Component files: PascalCase (UserCard.tsx)
Utility files: camelCase (formatDate.ts)
Test files: ComponentName.test.tsx
Page files: page.tsx, layout.tsx, loading.tsx, error.tsx
API routes: route.ts inside app/api/
Never use 'any' — use 'unknown' and narrow with guards
All async functions must have explicit return types
API response types go in /types/api.ts
Use Zod for runtime validation of external data
Prefer type inference over explicit annotation when obvious
Use Tailwind CSS utility classes — no inline styles
Use cn() helper from /lib/utils for conditional classes
Follow 8px spacing grid (2, 4, 6, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32...)
Dark mode uses Tailwind's dark: variant
Custom colors defined in tailwind.config.ts, not hardcoded
Server state: use React's built-in cache() and fetch()
Client state: use Zustand stores in /stores/
Form state: use React Hook Form
URL state: use nuqs or searchParams
Never use useEffect for data fetching — use Server Components
Unit tests: Vitest + React Testing Library
E2E tests: Playwright in /e2e/
Test user behavior, not implementation details
Mock external APIs, never internal modules
Every form and user interaction needs at least one test

forbiddenZones.reason: Auth routes require security review before modification
Environment files must never be modified by agents
DB migrations are irreversible — require human review
